name: @rir360/ui
description: A collection of reusable UI elements

splide.name: splide
splide.description: A Splide carousel wrapper with auto-scroll optimized for Next.js

section.name: section
section.description: A base layout wrapper with configurable max-width, padding, and semantic tag

header.name: header
header.description: Sticky header with logo, navigation, CTA button, optional banner, and mobile drawer

hero.name: hero
hero.description: Hero section with title, description, CTA button, and optional image

editorial.name: editorial
editorial.description: Two-column section with reversible image and text layout

grid.name: grid
grid.description: Responsive grid layout with configurable columns (1-6)

card.name: card
card.description: Basic card with image, title, description, and CTA

contact-form.name: contact-form
contact-form.description: Contact form with name, email, message fields and async submit handler

footer.name: footer
footer.description: Footer with logo, navigation links, social links, and copyright
